description: Long, straight neck and bill.  Short tail and medium legs.  Seen soaring, with long broad wings, slightly tucked.  Wingspan was estimated at 1.5 meters, with pretty good accuracy ( thanks to stereo cameras ).  No human observers.  This bird was detected and photographed automatically by a prototype Identiflight unit operating at Boulder Imaging headquarters. See https://www.identiflight.com/The bird was tracked briefly as it flew by.  It was observed coming from due south, and leaving towards the northeast.
